afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_HEADWIND_MIN_KNOTS
afterSnapshot.description: Minimum wind speed (knots) for a head-on wind to be flagged as a headwind risk.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: A light head-on breeze is not a real obstacle; require a minimum strength.
implementation: 10 kn is where upwind progress noticeably slows for typical cruisers.
